sqlMap.select: select * from parentprop where propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.insert: insert into parentprop(propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno, parent, op val seq eval ) values (#propertyno:NUMERIC#, #propertyversionno:NUMERIC#, #metaobjectno:NUMERIC#, #structureno:NUMERIC#, #parent#, #op# #val# #seq# #eval# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('parentprop') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select parentpropno, parent, op, val, seq, eval, propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno from parentprop where parentpropno = #parentpropno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.update:
update parentprop set
parent = #parent# parent = null op = #op# op = null val = #val# val = null seq = #seq# seq = null eval = #eval# eval = null
where parentpropno = #parentpropno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.delete: delete from parentprop where parentpropno = #parentpropno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
delete from parentprop where propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.select: select parentpropno, parent, op, val, seq, eval, propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno from parentprop where parentpropno = #parentpropno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#

select parentpropno, propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno, parent, op, val from parentprop where propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
